description: بحث Bing عبر Playwright مع انتظار تحميل النتائج - difrence food oran
command_preview:
import asyncio, json
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def scrape():
    results = {'data': {}, 'errors': []}
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        ctx = await browser.new_context(user_agent='Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', locale='fr-FR')
        page = await ctx.new_page()
        # Try Bing search with proper JS wait
        try:
            await page.goto('https://www.bing.com/search?q=%22difrence+food%22+oran', timeout=15000)
            await page.wait_for_selector('#b_results', timeout=10000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            items = await page.query_selector_all('#b_results .b_algo')
